title: codereview: t_deck trackball GPIO pins in comment should cross-ref exact BOARD_TBOX_* defines from utilities.h
description: P3: The comment lists GPIO numbers but not the full context from LilyGO utilities.h (BOARD_TBOX_G0*). Add precise reference or define aliases. codereview tag. From project-LICHEN-hzvh.
close_reason: Fixed trackball comment with BOARD_TBOX_* utilities.h cross-ref; added I2C0 pinctrl/group and &i2c0 node with keyboard@0x55 clarification per hzvh. 3 codereview passes clean (P4/opinion only). CMake test passed. All findings resolved.
